stories.title: Russian online retail warehouses hit by deadly Ukrainian strikes
stories.summary: Drones targeted Wildberries facilities near Moscow and in Tambov. Ukraine's leader called them "major logistics facilities" supplying "sanctioned components".

stories.title: Many Ukrainian soldiers outraged over removal of defence minister, troops tell BBC
stories.summary: Protests erupted in Ukraine on Thursday after Mykhailo Fedorov's removal - and now soldiers are also criticising the move.

stories.title: US strikes hit Iran for seventh consecutive night
stories.summary: Iran has retaliated against US allies in the region, with Kuwait reporting that a power and water plant had been hit.

stories.title: Trump threatens new Canada tariffs over fires sending 'filthy' air into US cities
stories.summary: Canadian leader Mark Carney says both the US and Canada have an equal responsibility to fight climate change, which experts say are worsening wildfire conditions.

stories.title: Space start-up launches India’s first commercial rocket designed for orbit
stories.summary: India's first space-tech unicorn Skyroot Aerospace successfully launched Vikram-1 on Saturday.

stories.title: Laos says it can't determine cause of tourist deaths linked to methanol
stories.summary: Officials say they have no evidence of poisoning over the 2024 deaths because autopsies were not conducted.

stories.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
stories.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.

stories.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
stories.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.

stories.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
stories.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.

stories.title: Financial Services Roundup: Market Talk
stories.summary: Gain insight on Experian, SoFi Technologies and more in the latest Market Talks covering Financial Services.

stories.title: Arabica Coffee Prices Hit Record on U.S., Colombia Tariff Spat
stories.summary: Arabica coffee prices hit a record level, as traders digested the withdrawal of President Trump’s threats to impose tariffs and economic sanctions on Colombia.

stories.title: Swiss franc, Japanese yen Rise as DeepSeek News Boosts Safe Havens
stories.summary: The Yen and Swiss Franc were stronger against the dollar as investors sought safe havens after Chinese start-up DeepSeek’s new AI model hit U.S. tech stocks.

stories.title: Import prices post surprise gain as costs of goods from China hit highest since 2008
stories.summary: Import prices were up 0.3% for the month, as a drop in energy was more than offset by increases elsewhere.

stories.title: World Cup gave bars and restaurants a needed boost as consumers flash warning signs, Fed says
stories.summary: The latest edition of the Fed's Beige Book indicated that the soccer tournament wasn't necessarily translating to broader economic growth.

stories.title: Wholesale prices unexpectedly declined 0.3% in June on big drop in gasoline
stories.summary: As with consumer prices, the index benefited from easing energy costs, particularly as oil fell due to the brief pause in tensions between the U.S. and Iran.

stories.title: Renewed Hormuz hostilities drive ECB rates rethink amid ‘extremely volatile’ outlook
stories.summary: Several consecutive days of strikes exchanged between the U.S. and Iran have cast uncertainty on the European Central Bank's interest rate decision next week.

stories.title: China posts slowest quarterly growth since 2022 as investment slumps, fanning stimulus calls
stories.summary: That second-quarter growth came below Beijing's full-year growth target range of 4.5% to 5%, the least ambitious goal in decades.

stories.title: Consumer prices rose 3.5% annually in June, less than expected as energy prices eased
stories.summary: The consumer price index in June was expected to increase 3.8% from a year ago.

stories.title: Will AI fix prior authorization—or make it worse?
stories.summary: The government is piloting a program that uses AI for insurance-coverage decisions.

stories.title: Google-backed satellites for wildfire detection launch as smoke chokes US, Canada
stories.summary: The FireSat program can spot wildfires that other satellites miss.

stories.title: The Pentagon's Space Development Agency hasn't moved as fast as anyone would like
stories.summary: "Missiles are being launched at the joint force every single day in [Operation] Epic Fury."

stories.summary: "We're turning the clock back on rational healthcare."

stories.title: Taco Bell iceberg lettuce identified as source of cyclosporiasis in 5 states
stories.summary: Don't eat Taco Bell lettuce in Indiana, Kentucky, Michigan, Ohio, or West Virginia.

stories.title: Troubling new details emerge on diabetes ouster controversy
stories.summary: American Diabetes Association blocked publication of op-ed articles so the authors posted them as a preprint.

stories.title: Kaspersky identifies malware framework targeting crypto investors
stories.summary: Cybersecurity company Kaspersky said a newly identified malware framework is targeting cryptocurrency investors through social engineering tactics and trojanized GitHub apps.

stories.title: French gambling regulator orders ISPs to block Polymarket
stories.summary: France’s gambling authority has ordered the country’s internet service providers to geoblock Polymarket, citing illegal gambling and market manipulation concerns.

stories.title: FTX to distribute $900M to creditors in fifth payment round
stories.summary: The FTX Recovery Trust and company have distributed about $10 billion since the exchange filed for bankruptcy in November 2022, leaving users cut off from their funds.

stories.title: Galaxy lands 15-year Texas Tech stadium naming rights deal
stories.summary: Galaxy Digital will rename Texas Tech’s football stadium under a 15-year agreement, expanding its West Texas presence as the state attracts growing crypto investment.

stories.title: Consensys unknowingly outsourced developer work to North Korean
stories.summary: Through an introduction with a “reputable third-party service provider,“ the company took on a developer who, as part of an investigation, was revealed to be tied to North Korea.

stories.summary: The print, found in a book donated to a Salvation Army shop, is snapped up by an anonymous bidder.
